name: Pickled Baby Carrot with Mustard Seeds Honey & Dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a bowl and blend thoroughly.
2. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add the baby carrots and cook until just crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Drain the carrots well. Toss them with the blended dressing.
4. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
5. Cover and refrigerate overnight (or up to 3 days ahead).
6. Serve the carrots at room temperature, mixed with dill.
